steps: Distribute 7xy across both terms inside the parentheses: 7xy · 2x² = 14x³y and 7xy · 8y = 56xy².
choiceElimination:
• Choice A — '14x³y + 56y²': The second term is missing the x factor. 7xy · 8y = 56xy², not 56y². ✗
  • Choice B — '14x²y + 56xy': First term drops an x (should be x³), second term drops a y (should be xy²). ✗
  • Choice C — '14x²y + 56xy²': First term has x² instead of x³; 7xy · 2x² = 14x³y, not 14x²y. ✗
  • Choice D — '14x³y + 56xy²': Both terms match the distribution exactly. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
